name: @prune/prefix-align
description: List1 openai-increment-prefix-aligner — align a stable prompt prefix to the provider's cache-increment boundary (OpenAI: caching starts at 1024 tokens, then 128-token increments). Computes the cacheable portion, the wasted tail beyond the last boundary, and the pad-to-next-boundary advice that captures the most prefix as cacheable. Pure arithmetic over caller-supplied token counts; no regex, no model.
